## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing project patterns
- [ ] Tests were run or clearly documented as not run
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, credentials, account identity, conversations, private screenshots, or PII were added
- [ ] No unrelated changes were included
- [ ] Documentation was updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Protocol support is based on reviewed semantics, not decoding alone
- [ ] Accessibility work stays inside the documented geometry/structure boundary
